summary: Phase 2 testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including Admin Panel, Analytics Dashboard, and order persistence to MongoDB.
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Default Desi Road restaurant seeded with 15 menu items on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 complete. All features tested: Restaurant CRUD, Orders with MongoDB persistence, Analytics dashboard, WhatsApp status (configured:false as expected), Kitchen/Reception alerts, Google Review endpoints, Admin Panel with all fields, TTS working with ElevenLabs paid plan.

backend: GET /api/restaurant/default - Returns seeded Desi Road config with 15 menu items ✓
PUT /api/restaurant/default - Updates restaurant config (tested name change) ✓
POST /api/orders - Creates order in MongoDB and returns order_id ✓
Order persistence verification - Create then GET confirms MongoDB persistence ✓
GET /api/analytics/summary - Returns stats (total_orders, conversations, revenue_estimate etc) ✓
GET /api/whatsapp/status - Returns configured:false when no Twilio creds ✓
POST /api/alerts/kitchen/test - Endpoint exists and returns status ✓
POST /api/alerts/reception/test - Endpoint exists and returns status ✓
POST /api/chat with restaurant_id - Works with dynamic restaurant config ✓
POST /api/tts - Returns 200 with audio (ElevenLabs paid plan working) ✓
frontend: System section in sidebar with Admin Panel and Analytics nav items ✓
Admin Panel loads with restaurant details form pre-filled ✓
Admin Panel shows 15 menu items with delete buttons ✓
Admin Panel shows WhatsApp Integration section with 'Not Configured' badge ✓
Admin Panel shows kitchen/reception phone fields ✓
Admin Panel shows Tonight's Special section ✓
Admin Panel shows Google Review Automation section ✓
Admin Panel Save button works - shows 'Configuration saved successfully!' ✓
Admin Panel Test Kitchen Alert button works ✓
Admin Panel Test Reception Alert button works ✓
Analytics Dashboard shows stat cards (Total Orders, AI Conversations, Est. Revenue, Messages) ✓
Analytics Dashboard shows System Activity (WhatsApp, Kitchen, Reviews) ✓
Analytics Dashboard shows Orders by Language ✓
Analytics Dashboard shows Recent Orders table ✓
Demo chat works end-to-end (type message, get AI reply with Indian fillers) ✓
Order confirmation persists to backend (creates order in MongoDB) ✓
Order confirmation shows 'Kitchen alert sent instantly' message ✓
